project_area: Arts and culture experiences, arts education, sector strengthening, capital support for arts spaces
demographic_requirements: Intentionally designed for diverse abilities and backgrounds, prioritizing inclusive and equitable engagement, particularly for youth (ages 5-18) with limited access to arts education
eligibility_summary: Open to arts and culture organizations, schools, and community-based initiatives in the Philadelphia region that advance inclusive, equitable, and high-quality arts experiences. Supports projects that engage diverse communities, strengthen sector networks, and improve physical access to arts spaces.
